loan_contract_no.default: select max(loan_contract_no) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_type = 'ส' and begining_of_contract >= sysdate - 3
loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

root.sql: SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, extract ( day from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) as begin_day, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'MONTH') as begin_month, extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) + 543 as begin_year, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as memname, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , ((to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'yyyy'))::numeric) - ((to_char( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,'yyyy'))::numeric) as mem_age, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.position_long, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no, sc_mem_m_member_address.moo, sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol, sc_mem_m_member_address.road, sc_mem_m_member_address.soi, pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as mem_distinct, pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as mem_province, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.manager_name as group_manager_name, si_security_user.user_name FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_member_work_info, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr, sc_mem_m_member_address, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status , si_security_user, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status ) and ( si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ -- AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ส65000004' ) ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC
